com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.userinfo

Class AuthenticatedUserInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.userinfo.AuthenticatedUserInfo

  • public class AuthenticatedUserInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides Authenticated User information
    Since:
    API 5

      • getAuthenticationType

        public ExtendedUserInfo.AuthenticationType getAuthenticationType()
        Returns AuthenticationType
        Returns:
        authenticationType

        • Return can be null if the ExtendedUserInfo.AuthenticationType is empty

        API 5
